; DNS records for zerobytemode.com
; Generated by Gemini CLI
; This is a BIND-compatible file for Cloudflare DNS import.
;
; Notes:
; - The TTL (Time To Live) is set to 1, which corresponds to 'Auto' in Cloudflare's settings.
; - The Proxy status (orange/grey cloud) cannot be set in a BIND file.
;   You will need to review and set the proxy status for these records in the Cloudflare dashboard after importing.

zerobytemode.com. 1 IN A 185.199.109.153
zerobytemode.com. 1 IN A 185.199.110.153
zerobytemode.com. 1 IN A 185.199.111.153
